title: Ruta Picos de Yospi
description: This guided trail takes you through natural wonders like bat caves, ancient petroglyphs, and clay workshops. It’s a journey into the heart of Otomí territory, where storytelling, nature, and craftsmanship come together.

title: La Caminata del Pulque
description: A unique cultural walk through traditional pulquerías in downtown Amealco. Learn about the history of pulque, taste seasonal varieties, and connect with local producers in a relaxed, immersive experience.

title: Sendero a Calixto
description: A scenic hiking route that winds through ravines, forests, and wildlife habitats. With fresh mountain air and panoramic views, it’s ideal for nature lovers seeking quiet adventure and regional biodiversity.
